text.title: Generative UI Design Spec Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for generative-ui-design.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the generative UI bounded by grammar + fallback + eval suite?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — restrict grammar before any other check
EXPAND — add cases until ≥30 across strata
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
